---
title: "오픈 통계 패키지"
subtitle: "BitStat2"
fig-format: svg
editor:
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
listing:
  - id: stat-data
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - data
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-infer
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - infer
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-eda
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - eda
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-theory
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - theory
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png    
---


# 추론

::: {#stat-infer}
:::

# EDA

::: {#stat-eda}
:::

# 이론

::: {#stat-theory}
:::


# 데이터

::: {#stat-data}
:::
